channel.title: Seth Klarman — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED VST (+25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added VST in Q4 2025 · 11.4% of portfolio. Aggressive Vistra add — AI data center demand thesis.

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED GOOG (+40%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added GOOG in Q4 2025 · 5.2% of portfolio. Building out new Alphabet position.

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q4 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio. Continued Warner Bros. profit-taking.

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION QSR (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position QSR (RESTAURANT BRANDS INTL INC) in Q4 2025 · 10.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION AMZN (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q4 2025 · 9.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION FNF (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position FNF (FIDELITY NATL INFORMATION SV) in Q4 2025 · 5.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION FE (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position FE (FISERV INC) in Q4 2025 · 2.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION CRH (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position CRH (CRH PLC) in Q4 2025 · 2.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED VST (+30%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added VST in Q3 2025 · 9.6% of portfolio. AI data center thesis — big add.

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION GOOG · Q3 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position GOOG in Q3 2025 · 3.8% of portfolio. First-time Alphabet position.

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q3 2025 · 11.8% of portfolio. Taking Warner Bros. profits.

item.title: Seth Klarman: EXITED CRH (-100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) exited CRH (CRH PLC) in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) exited FNF (FIDELITY NATL INFORMATION SV) in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) exited QSR (RESTAURANT BRANDS INTL INC) in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) exited FE (FISERV INC) in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED VST (+22%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added VST in Q2 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio. First of three consecutive quarters building Vistra.

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-10%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q2 2025 · 13.0% of portfolio. Starting the Warner Bros. exit.
